acquisition method: the peptides collected after FASP centrifugation are directly analyzed by DDA-MS.
cleavage agent: we applied our protocol to the proteases Trypsin, Lys-C, Asp-N, Glu-C and Chymotrypsin...
collision energy: a CID fragmentation method with normalized collision energy 35 was used...
fragmentation method: a CID fragmentation method with normalized collision energy 35 was used...
instrument: The LC–MS/MS analysis of the protease-digested samples was performed on an Orbitrap Elite...
labeling: the peptides collected after FASP centrifugation are directly analyzed by DDA-MS.
